title: Lady Liberty Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
subjects: Presidents and presidential powers, Vice Presidents
crs_summary: Lady Liberty Act of 2025 This bill sets a floor of 125,000 for the maximum number of refugees who may be admitted into the United States each fiscal year beginning in FY2027. Under current law, the President sets the annual cap on refugee admissions at the beginning of each fiscal year.
